examples.title: Complex Number Addition using Friend Function
examples.description: Demonstrates overloading + operator using friend function for Complex class
examples.explanation: The friend function operator+ takes two Complex objects as parameters and returns a new Complex object. Both c1 + c2 and c2 + c1 work due to symmetry.

examples.title: Stream Operators Overloading
examples.description: Shows how to overload << and >> operators using friend functions
examples.explanation: ostream& and istream& are returned to enable chaining. The >> overload uses non-const reference as it modifies the object.

examples.title: Unary Operator using Friend Function
examples.description: Demonstrates overloading unary operator (negation) using friend function
examples.explanation: Unary operators take only one parameter since they operate on a single operand. The friend function negates both components.

examples.title: Return by Reference for Chaining
examples.description: Shows the importance of returning by reference in operator overloading
examples.explanation: Returning by reference allows chained operations like a + b + c. The result of (a+b) can be used for the next + operation.
